title: Good: regex patterns compiled exactly once via LazyLock
description: content.rs uses std::sync::LazyLock for all four compiled Regex patterns (HASHTAG_RE, MENTION_RE, URL_RE, LINK_RE). These are initialized on first use, never recompiled, and thread-safe. This is the correct pattern for process_content which is called on every outbox response, every delivery batch build, and every HTML profile render. A well-intentioned contributor adding a new pattern is guided by example to do the same.
